## ARCHIVED - Legislation and Guidelines - Biologics, Radiopharmaceuticals and Genetic Therapies - Health Canada

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.

Health Canada is actively involved in a number of global initiatives to support and enhance our regulatory framework related to biologics, radiopharmaceuticals and genetic therapies.

## What information can you find here?
This section contains links to information on legislation and guidelines related to biologics, radiopharmaceuticals and genetic therapies.
